# Requirements — <project name>

Bare variant per ADR-0003. For fluent authors and agents. The guided
variant at `requirements-template.md` carries the prose, the 29148
information-item explanations, and the requirement-characteristics
guide; this file carries the structure only.

Shape: ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148:2018 (current edition; 2011 paraphrase at
`LIB-0010` is content-equivalent for the structural shape).

Stewarded by `tech-lead` (intake) and `researcher` (numbering,
traceability).
